# Validation Gates

## Mechanical Gate

- hose-plug size options tested on the real hose
- hose-plug insertion force acceptable
- clamp access confirmed
- block envelope fits the intended installation space

## Electrical Gate

- regulated rails stable
- controller boots reliably
- display initializes and touch is readable
- TEC driver defaults to disabled at reset
- sensor readings are sane

## Thermal Gate

- hot-side cooling mounted correctly
- condensation monitoring active
- initial TEC tests performed with conservative limits
- water-loop testing only after dry checks pass
